news.headline: Chinese grandpa works as beauty influencer to fund disabled grandson’s costly treatment
news.summary:

news.headline: Convicted Rapist Who Fled to Scotland and Faked His Own Death Dies in Utah
news.summary: Nicholas Rossi, 38, raped two girlfriends in 2008 and later fled to Scotland, prosecutors said. An attentive nurse treating him for Covid in 2021 identified him.

news.headline: Trump justifies strikes on Iran amid ceasefire
